subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou be favored through divine providence and, illumined by the lights of the Throne, lead all humanity unto that which is the cause of exaltation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت الهی فائز باشی و بانوار عرش منور جمیع ناس را بانچه سبب ارتفاع
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @call to action, @justice and wrath of God
